Cross-linked polyethylene (XLPE) is the dominant insulation material for [HV Cable System](../prod/hv-cable.md) systems operating at 66 kV and above. ^[72e6e04a4cd21cc8:doc:1]

## Properties

XLPE provides dielectric strength of 20-30 kV/mm with operating temperature up to 90°C. ^[72e6e04a4cd21cc8:doc:1]

## Suppliers

Approved compounds: Borealis Visico LE4253 and Dow HFDA-4202 EC. ^[d0164e47b24d660f:doc:1]
